basic_details.job_title: NISER Research Associate I Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.organization_name: National Institute of Science Education and Research Bhubaneswar (NISER)
basic_details.short_information: The National Institute of Science Education and Research Bhubaneswar (NISER) has officially announced the Research Associate I Recruitment 2026 with 1 vacancy under Advertisement No. NISER / R&D-323 / CH2503 / 17 / 2026-27. Candidates holding a Ph.D. degree in Physics or Chemistry from a recognized university are eligible to apply for this contractual position. Applicants must not exceed 35 years of age. Selected candidates will receive a monthly salary of Rs. 58,000. Interested and eligible candidates can submit their applications through email on or before 10 July 2026. Direct links to downl

age_limit.details: Maximum Age Limit: 35 years as on 10-07-2026. Age relaxation to entitled categories as per rules.

qualification.education_qualification: PhD degree in Physics or Chemistry from a recognized university
qualification.details: PhD degree in Physics or Chemistry from a recognized university.

selection_process: research statement and letters of reference Interview (in person or through video-conferencing)
how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for NISER Research Associate-I Recruitment 2026 via email should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience.
Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs.
Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email.
Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification.
Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 10-07-2026.
Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

content_sections.heading: NISER Research Associate I Vacancy 2026 Notification PDF
content_sections.text: Candidates should download and read the NISER Jobs 2026 notification PDF carefully to check vacancy details, eligibility, age limit, and application instructions. The notification also includes important dates and selection process details. The direct download link is available in the Important Links section below. Download NISER Research Associate I Job 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: How to Apply
content_sections.text: Candidates who wish to apply for NISER Research Associate-I Recruitment 2026 via email should follow the steps below. Read the official notification carefully before applying. Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience. Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs. Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email. Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification. Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 10-07-2026. Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

content_sections.heading: NISER Research Associate I Recruitment 2026 - Important Links

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the NISER Research Associate-I recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit your application via email for the NISER Research Associate-I position is 10th July 2026.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for the Research Associate-I post?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess a PhD degree in Physics or Chemistry from a recognized university to be eligible for this position.

faq.question: Q3. What is the age limit for the Research Associate-I position?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for the Research Associate-I post is 35 years as of 10th July 2026, with age relaxation applicable for reserved categories.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered for the Research Associate-I role?
faq.answer: The selected candidate will receive a consolidated salary of Rs. 58,000 per month.

faq.question: Q5. How will candidates be selected for the Research Associate-I position?
faq.answer: The selection process involves shortlisting based on CV, research statement, and letters of reference, followed by an interview.

faq.question: Q6. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment.

faq.question: Q7. What is the mode of application for this NISER recruitment?
faq.answer: Eligible candidates can apply by sending their complete application via email.

faq.question: Q8. What is the total number of vacancies available?
faq.answer: There is one vacancy for the post of Research Associate-I in this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q9. Where is NISER located?
faq.answer: National Institute of Science Education and Research (NISER) is located in Bhubaneswar, Odisha.

faq.question: Q10. Can candidates from any state apply for this position?
faq.answer: The notification is for a position at NISER Bhubaneswar, Odisha. Candidates from all eligible backgrounds can apply as per the outlined criteria.
